whatSourceProves: ConfigValues.cpp declares cursor:default_monitor as MS<String> with default STRVAL_EMPTY.
Compositor.cpp reads cursor:default_monitor as PCURSORMONITOR and compares the configured value to monitor->m_name before warping the cursor.
whatSourceDoesNotProve: A static finite list of monitor names is not present in source; names are runtime monitor names.
Live runtime mutation safety is not proven by source inspection.

validNameProof: Monitor names present in the current fixture/mock/read-only-adapter snapshot are accepted.
missingNameRejectionProof: Empty candidate and empty monitor snapshots are rejected.
staleNameRejectionProof: A name accepted by an old snapshot is rejected after a refreshed snapshot no longer contains it.
unsafeNameRejectionProof: Newlines, command separators, command substitutions, path-like names, parent paths, and shell-style home paths are rejected.
readOnlyAdapterStatus: ReadOnlyHyprctlMonitorNameOracle models hyprctl monitors as a read-only adapter abstraction; tests parse fixture output only and do not query live runtime state.
proofUsed: official Hyprland source in ConfigValues.cpp and Compositor.cpp
proofStillMissing: live runtime mutation proof was not run and is not required for the current gated persistent-config temp proof
nextRecommendedSprint: Final all-341 writable coverage consistency review sprint
